positive: A majestic and highly detailed celestial forest scene viewed through a stained-glass window effect. The main subject is a glowing, bioluminescent canopy of stylized trees and flora forming intricate, dark silhouettes against a vibrant, cosmic nebula backdrop. The color palette emphasizes deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and electric violets, illuminated by a soft, ethereal golden glow that outlines the leaves and branches. Composition must be symmetrical and centered, ideal for repeating apparel pattern prints. Highly contrasted, clean lines, graphic novel quality, engraved illustration style, ultra-fine detail, deep depth of field, vector art quality.
negative: blur, noise, low contrast, poor anatomy, ugly, watermark, text, signature, extra limbs, artifacts, fuzzy, messy background, logo, copyright, celebrity, realistic photo, 3d render, bokeh
